title: API Server Path Bug
content: api_server.py and knowledge_base.py had SELENA_ROOT pointing to selena instead of selena-project. This caused web interface and knowledge base to fail. Fixed by changing path from ~/openclaw/workspace/selena to ~/openclaw/workspace/selena-project

title: Open World Server Restart Needed
content: After code updates to open-world-selena, the server needs to be rebuilt (cargo build) and restarted. Old save files may be incompatible with new entity structures and need to be deleted to start fresh
